componentDescription: Directory renders a hierarchical tree of items — files and folders, categories and subcategories, navigation trees, and organizational structures. Items can be expanded/collapsed to reveal children. Use it for file explorers, nested navigation, and any tree-structured data.
compositionPattern: Pass a nested items array where each item can have children (making it a branch node). Provide onSelect to handle item selection. Track selectedId and expandedIds externally for controlled behavior.

usageExamples.title: File browser tree
usageExamples.description: Directory tree for a file system browser.
usageExamples.code:
<Directory
  items={[
    {
      id: 'src',
      label: 'src',
      icon: <FolderIcon />,
      children: [
        { id: 'components', label: 'components', icon: <FolderIcon />, children: [
          { id: 'Button.tsx', label: 'Button.tsx', icon: <FileIcon /> },
          { id: 'Input.tsx', label: 'Input.tsx', icon: <FileIcon /> },
        ]},
        { id: 'index.ts', label: 'index.ts', icon: <FileIcon /> },
      ]
    },
    { id: 'package.json', label: 'package.json', icon: <FileIcon /> },
  ]}
  selectedId={selectedFile}
  onSelect={(item) => setSelectedFile(item.id)}
  expandedIds={expandedFolders}
  onExpand={setExpandedFolders}
/>

usageExamples.title: Category navigation tree
usageExamples.description: Hierarchical category selector for content management.

items.llmContext: Required. Array of DirectoryItemType. Each item: { id: string, label: string, icon?: ReactNode, children?: DirectoryItemType[] }. Items with children are branch nodes (expandable). Items without children are leaf nodes. All ids must be unique across the entire tree.
items.propDescription: Required. Hierarchical array of tree items

onSelect.llmContext: Callback fired with the clicked item object when user selects a node. Use to update selectedId state and trigger content loading or navigation.
onSelect.propDescription: Called with item object when user selects a node

selectedId.llmContext: The id string of the currently selected/highlighted item. Use to highlight the active item in the tree. For file browsers, this is the currently open file. For navigation trees, this is the current page.
selectedId.propDescription: ID of the currently selected item

expandedIds.llmContext: Array of id strings for all currently expanded branch nodes. Manage with useState to control which folders/groups are open. Initialize with the ids of nodes that should be pre-expanded.
expandedIds.propDescription: Array of IDs for currently expanded branch nodes

onExpand.llmContext: Called with the updated expandedIds array when a branch node is toggled. Update your expandedIds state here.
onExpand.propDescription: Called with updated expanded IDs array when a node is toggled
